description: The 91st Academy Awards saw "Green Book" win Best Picture, Alfonso Cuar�n win Best Director for "Roma", Rami Malek win Best Actor for "Bohemian Rhapsody", and Olivia Colman win Best Actress for "The Favourite". Other winners included "Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse" for Best Animated Feature Film and "Free Solo" for Best Documentary Feature.
